+            # Find the closest frontier to the robot

+            robot_arr = np.array(obs['robot_pos'])

+            frontier_arr = np.array(frontiers)

+            frontier_dists = np.sqrt(np.sum((frontier_arr - robot_arr)**2, axis=1))

+            closest_frontier_idx = np.argmin(frontier_dists)

+            target_frontier = frontiers[closest_frontier_idx]

+            # Find the reachable node closest to that frontier

+                next_step = path[0]
